/.title: ReviewIntel | AI Product Review Analyzer for Smarter Buying Decisions
/.description: ReviewIntel turns messy product reviews into instant buying confidence. Analyze reviews, detect fake-review risk, compare products, and understand what customers really say before you buy or sell.

/pricing.title: ReviewIntel Pricing | Shopper and Seller AI Review Intelligence Plans
/pricing.description: Choose the right ReviewIntel plan for fast product analysis, buyer confidence reports, seller insights, review intelligence, and premium product comparison tools.

/about.title: About ReviewIntel | AI Review Intelligence for Buyers and Sellers
/about.description: ReviewIntel helps shoppers make faster product decisions and helps sellers understand customer feedback using AI-powered review analysis, risk signals, and product insights.

/faq.title: ReviewIntel FAQ | AI Product Review Analyzer Questions Answered
/faq.description: Get answers about ReviewIntel, AI review analysis, fake-review risk, product comparisons, shopper reports, seller insights, privacy, and subscriptions.

/contact.title: Contact ReviewIntel | Support for AI Review Analysis
/contact.description: Contact ReviewIntel for support, product questions, seller analytics help, advertising inquiries, billing support, or account assistance.

/login.title: Login to ReviewIntel | AI Product Review Dashboard
/login.description: Sign in to ReviewIntel to access your AI review analysis dashboard, saved product scans, shopper insights, seller reports, and product comparison tools.

/signup.title: Create a ReviewIntel Account | Start AI Product Review Analysis
/signup.description: Create your ReviewIntel account and start analyzing product reviews, detecting fake-review risk, comparing products, and unlocking smarter buying decisions.

/analyze.title: AI Product Review Analyzer | Upload, Scan, and Decide Fast
/analyze.description: Use ReviewIntel to analyze product reviews instantly. Upload reviews, paste product feedback, or scan data to get a fast AI buying-confidence report.

/compare.title: AI Product Comparison Tool | Compare Reviews and Find the Stronger Choice
/compare.description: Compare products with ReviewIntel using AI review intelligence, customer sentiment, complaints, fake-review risk, value signals, and buyer confidence insights.

/results.title: ReviewIntel Results | Instant AI Product Review Insights
/results.description: View ReviewIntel AI results with buying confidence, review patterns, fake-review risk, product strengths, complaints, and clear decision signals.

/reviews.title: ReviewIntel Reviews | Smarter Product Feedback Intelligence
/reviews.description: Explore how ReviewIntel turns customer reviews into clear product insights, buyer confidence, seller intelligence, and faster decisions.

/advertise.title: Advertise with ReviewIntel | Reach Product Shoppers and Sellers
/advertise.description: Promote your brand with ReviewIntel advertising placements designed for product shoppers, online sellers, ecommerce tools, and review intelligence audiences.

/advertise/apply.title: Apply to Advertise on ReviewIntel | Sponsor Placement Request
/advertise/apply.description: Apply for ReviewIntel advertising and sponsorship opportunities to reach shoppers, sellers, ecommerce brands, and product research audiences.

/buyer-review-analyzer.title: Buyer Review Analyzer | AI Buying Confidence Before You Purchase
/buyer-review-analyzer.description: ReviewIntel helps buyers understand product reviews fast with AI verdicts, fake-review risk, common complaints, strengths, and buying-confidence signals.

/consumer-review-analyzer.title: Consumer Review Analyzer | AI Insights from Customer Feedback
/consumer-review-analyzer.description: Analyze consumer reviews with ReviewIntel to understand product quality, trust signals, complaints, value, and buyer satisfaction before making a decision.

/amazon-review-analyzer.title: Amazon Review Analyzer | AI Product Review Scanner
/amazon-review-analyzer.description: Analyze Amazon-style product reviews with ReviewIntel to detect review patterns, fake-review risk, buyer sentiment, complaints, and product value signals.

/fake-review-detector.title: Fake Review Detector | AI Risk Signals for Product Reviews
/fake-review-detector.description: Use ReviewIntel to identify suspicious review patterns, fake-review risk signals, unnatural feedback, and product trust concerns before buying.

/seller-review-analytics.title: Seller Review Analytics | AI Customer Feedback Intelligence
/seller-review-analytics.description: ReviewIntel helps sellers understand customer reviews, product complaints, strengths, competitor signals, and buyer sentiment using AI-powered analytics.

/product-complaint-analyzer.title: Product Complaint Analyzer | Find What Customers Dislike Fast
/product-complaint-analyzer.description: ReviewIntel identifies recurring product complaints, quality issues, customer pain points, and improvement opportunities from customer reviews.

/product-feedback-dashboard.title: Product Feedback Dashboard | AI Review Intelligence for Teams
/product-feedback-dashboard.description: Turn product feedback into a clear dashboard with ReviewIntel. Track complaints, strengths, customer sentiment, product issues, and review intelligence.
